rows.qual:
((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (p.global_role = 'admin'::text)))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ((operations op
     JOIN projects pr ON ((pr.id = op.project_id)))
     JOIN organization_members om ON ((om.organization_id = pr.organization_id)))
  WHERE ((op.id = pfmea_rows.operation_id) AND (om.user_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (om.role <> 'customer'::app_role)))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (operations op
     JOIN customer_access_grants cag ON ((cag.project_id = op.project_id)))
  WHERE ((op.id = pfmea_rows.operation_id) AND (cag.customer_user_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND cag.active AND (cag.module = 'PFMEA'::text)))))

((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (p.global_role = 'admin'::text)))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM organization_members om
  WHERE ((om.user_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (om.organization_id = projects.organization_id) AND (om.role <> 'customer'::app_role)))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM customer_access_grants cag
  WHERE ((cag.project_id = projects.id) AND (cag.customer_user_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND cag.active))))
